name: TjoeReviewKit
description: TjoeReviewKit is tjoe's local offline AI workflow review kit for prepared examples, approval boundaries, forbidden actions, regression cases, output normalization, source-boundary checks, and AI answer review. It is not a hosted SaaS, dashboard, runtime trace collector, SDK instrumentation layer, Agent runtime, live tool caller, web browser, or safety certification system.
softwareRequirements: Python 3; local JSON files only; no model calls; no network calls required by the runner
